items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: People sometimes ask why fine-tune when general-purpose models keep getting better. Bridgewater's work is a good reminder that with the right data -- here, expert judgements -- you can beat prompting-only approaches by a lot. @ddkang and the Bridgewater AIA Labs team are great -- glad to see them sharing this.

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Less than a year ago, we launched the Remote Labor Index with @CAIS to measure how well AI agents can complete paid freelance work. Since then, the best automation rate has jumped from less than 3% to 16%. We've also added results for three frontier models to the leaderboard: 🥇 Fable 5 🥈 Opus 4.8 🥉 Codex GPT 5.5

items.author: @IcarusHermes
items.text: The moment you let an AI agent spend money, you stop knowing if it's making any. daedalus fixes that. It gives a Hermes agent a real P&L. It's a plugin that turns an agent into a business that runs itself: it prices a job, takes payment through @stripe, and to do the work it spends, but only through a gate it cannot by

items.text: i mean even in the mimo paper isnt this still bullish on mix-RL? The SWE teacher seems equivalent to the mix with MOPD then spending more compute for the same performance. roundup.title: Fable 5 Returns, Tops CursorBench & RLI
roundup.subtitle: Claude Fable 5 重返全球，CursorBench 与 RLI 双料领先
headline: @AnthropicAI 宣布 Claude Fable 5 明日全球恢复上线，新增网络安全分类器，常规任务回退至 Opus 4.8。@cursor_ai 同步更新 Cursor 支持，Fable 5 在 CursorBench 上领先所有模型。
@kimmonismus 报告 Fable-5 在 Remote Labor Index 达到 16.10%，刷新公开榜单。@ScaleAILabs 确认该基准过去一年从不足 3% 跃升至 16%，真实远程工作自动化取得突破。
@OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.6 Sol，强化网络安全防护并支持长时程安全任务。@GoogleDeepMind 同期推出 Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Gemini Omni Flash，两款模型分别针对图像与视频生成优化。
@github 与 @OpenRouter 均确认 Fable 5 已重新接入 Copilot 与平台，@claudeai 表示付费用户 7 月 7 日前可使用至每周限额 50%。

deepDives.title: Claude Fable 5 重返与基准突破
deepDives.summary: Anthropic 在与美国政府沟通后恢复 Fable 5 全球访问，新分类器针对网络安全，模型在多个编码与远程劳动基准上取得领先。

facts.text: Fable 5 明日全球重新可用，常规任务回退 Opus 4.8
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 will be available again globally tomorrow. After conversations with US gov, redeploying with new classifiers for cybersecurity. Routine tasks fall back to Opus 4.8.

facts.text: Fable 5 在 CursorBench 领先所有模型
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 is available again in Cursor. It leads all models on CursorBench

facts.text: Fable-5 在 Remote Labor Index 达到 16.10%
facts.quote: Fable-5 now scores 16.10% on the Remote Labor Index, leading the public leaderboard.

bullish.text: 真实远程工作自动化从 3% 跃升至 16%，Fable 5 表现突出

deepDives.title: Google 发布 Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Omni Flash
deepDives.summary: GoogleDeepMind 推出两款新模型，Nano Banana 2 Lite 主打极致速度与成本，Gemini Omni Flash 专注视频生成与编辑。

facts.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite 文本转图像输出低于 4 秒
facts.quote: delivers text-to-image outputs in under 4 seconds

facts.text: Gemini Omni Flash 已通过 Gemini API 与 Google AI Studio 开放
facts.quote: Gemini Omni Flash: now available via the Gemini API and in @GoogleAIStudio

bullish.text: 最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 图像模型

Gemini Spark Beta 面向 Google AI Ultra 用户开放，强化个人 Agent 能力

GLM 5.2 在长上下文检索上比 Opus 4.8 便宜 4.3 倍，质量仅差 3.5%
bullets.quote: 4.3x cheaper with a mere 3.5% quality tradeoff vs. Opus 4.8

takeaways: Fable 5 回归后在真实劳动与编码基准双领先，Agent 工作流成本与安全需重新评估。
Google 新模型将图像生成延迟压至 4 秒以下，开发者管道吞吐能力显著提升。
RLI 从 3% 升至 16% 表明远程工作自动化进入实用阶段，建议尽快构建对应 eval 回路。
多平台（Cursor、Copilot、OpenRouter）同步恢复 Fable 5，跨工具 Agent 编排窗口已打开。
